caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a recording studio. She is positioned in profile, facing left toward a professional black microphone. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a black acoustic panel. A screen in the background displays the name "Johnson" in red text, with "Employee Only" written in smaller white text above it. To the right of the woman, the red text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the wall, accompanied by a smaller logo and the text "at 11 logo studio." A smaller logo for "PODCAST" is visible on the left. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, shifting only her facial expression from a neutral look to a slight smile as she looks toward the microphone.
